title: FileContentRequest
description: FileContentRequest: Used to read contents of one or more files.

File.description:
The content from this File will be queried.
You can also specify the file with a string Path.  FSFile: A FileSystem-hosted File. It can include the content of the File.

Types.description: Only objects of a Type specified in this list will be returned.

CustomDataKeys.description: Only BHoMObjects whose CustomData contains these key/value pairs will be returned.

FragmentTypes.description: Only BHoMObjects that own a Fragment of one of these Types will be returned.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
